original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem gripper-5grippers-2balls)
  (:domain gripper)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects
    rooma roomb
    ball1 ball2
    g1 g2 g3 g4 g5
  )
  (:init
    (room rooma)
    (room roomb)
    (ball ball1)
    (ball ball2)
    (gripper g1)
    (gripper g2)
    (gripper g3)
    (gripper g4)
    (gripper g5)
    (at-robby rooma)
    (carry ball1 g1)
    (carry ball2 g2)
    (free g3)
    (free g4)
    (free g5)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (at ball1 roomb)
      (at ball2 roomb)
    )
  )
)
